# Contributing to Neural Style Transfer

Thank you for your interest in contributing! 🎨

## Getting Started

1. Fork the repository
2. Clone your fork: `git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/neural-style-transfer.git`
3. Create a branch: `git checkout -b feature/your-feature`
4. Make your changes with clear, commented code
5. Test thoroughly
6. Submit a Pull Request

## Code Style

- **Python**: Follow PEP8, use Black for formatting (`black backend/`)
- **JavaScript**: ESLint configured, run `npm run lint`
- **Comments**: Every non-obvious function needs a docstring

## Ideas Welcome

- Fast NST (feed-forward network)
- Additional style presets
- WebSocket real-time progress
- Mobile responsive improvements
- Performance optimizations

## Reporting Bugs

Open an issue with:
- Your OS and Python/Node version
- Steps to reproduce
- Expected vs actual behavior
- Terminal output/screenshots
